name: MaxFastigheter i Sverige AB (publ)
summary: MaxFastigheter i Sverige AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, acquires, develops, owns, and manages real estate properties in Sweden. As of December 31, 2018, the company owned and operated 33 properties with a lettable area of 133,999 square meters for retail, recreation, public use, office, and logistics/industrial categories. The company was formerly known as MaxFast Properties AB (publ) and changed its name to MaxFastigheter i Sverige AB (publ) in February 2018. MaxFastigheter i Sverige AB (publ) was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Torsh√É¬§lla, Sweden.
